commands.repair_reason: Human follow-up is needed for the missing live Discord proof and the protected maintainer label; there is no narrow automated repair left after the snapshot follow-up commit.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern found; the diff only changes Discord draft formatting, shared formatting, tests, and changelog text. commands.review_summary:
The PR wires Discord `onReasoningStream` payload text into progress drafts, suppresses empty shared `Reasoning` progress items, adds delta/snapshot regression coverage, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main ignores Discord reasoning payload text while the shared formatter can render an empty analysis item titled `Reasoning`. The PR's focused tests model the delta and snapshot paths, but this read-only review did not run a live Discord bot.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed for the missing live Discord proof and the protected maintainer label; there is no narrow automated repair left after the snapshot follow-up commit.
